meaning: n.离奇出现的东西,(尤指)鬼怪,幽灵,幻影
examples: Before this awful apparition, I retreat in terror that is upon me as I write.
I am not precisely sure how long I stayed frozen in that position, but the next thing I recall is the apparition vanishing before my eyes.
This apparition grew to an old age, until he reached a maturity he could not improve on, and now he haunts the church in which his parents had married.
As for the Angel, van Eyck has transformed this divine messenger into a magnificent apparition.
When he kisses Judy during the circling apparition of the tower in her bedroom, the rhythm twists into ambivalence.
